mainspring master @ 63aa13e
Source: mainspring/core/autoresearch.py
Vendored: the WHOLE module, verbatim. Unlike the bias/gate seams, this is a
pure core-layer module (stdlib only, no ORM/LLM/platform), so it is copied
1:1 rather than hand-extracted — seam.py must stay byte-identical to source.
The brand (tali) injects fit_fn/score_fn/audit_fn + a Proposer; the loop
mechanics (propose -> fit -> score -> audit -> keep/discard) live here.
Re-vendor: bash backend/scripts/vendor_mainspring_autoresearch.sh
